endings.visual_description: giant alien-like bones in museum exhibit (lit)
endings.narrative_outcome: Good ending - alien shapeshifter killed with stiletto AND remains recovered/displayed
Continuation of museum reveal - aliens existence proven
Willmore killed in combat - game over
Mulder dies in iso chamber - rescue too late

endings.visual_description: office at night two men green-lamp lit (debriefing)
endings.required_conditions: bWillmoreDead=0 AND Mulder+Scully saved AND alien killed
endings.narrative_outcome: Best ending - all saved + bureau debriefing

endings.visual_description: wounded man pale white clothes (dying in iso chamber)
endings.narrative_outcome: Mulder dying scene - life support failing

endings.visual_description: older man profile in front of computer monitor
